summary: RMS Bug Fixes Testing (Iteration 179) - All 13 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified for Company Docs category filter pills (consistent height at 36px) and Keypad modal layout.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/auth/user/{user_id} correctly enriches response with store.slug and store.name (lines 817-843 in auth.py)
POST /api/docs/seed now clears existing docs and re-seeds - no longer returns 'already seeded' error (line 454 in docs.py)
POST /api/docs/generate-articles-of-incorporation generates AI-powered legal document with multiple slides (lines 933-1032 in docs.py)
POST /api/docs/seed-project-scope creates/updates operations manual via upsert (line 337 in docs.py)
Category filter pills use fixed height: 36 instead of dynamic paddingVertical (line 463 in admin/docs/index.tsx)
Keypad contact matches use position:'absolute' and top:'100%' for overlay behavior (line 285 in home.tsx)
Keypad matches ScrollView has maxHeight: 120 to prevent excessive space usage
seed_data_creation: None - used existing super admin account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Four bug fixes verified: 1) User endpoint now returns store slug/name for review link generation. 2) Docs seed endpoint clears and re-seeds - no more 'already seeded' error. 3) Articles of Incorporation AI generation works. 4) Category filter pills have fixed height. Keypad modal contact matching uses absolute positioning for overlay behavior. Company Docs page loads all seeded documents including Operations Manual, Legal (Articles of Incorporation, ToS, Privacy Policy), Cyber Security, Company Policy, Training, and Integrations.

auth_user_store_slug.status: PASS - returns store object with slug and name

docs_seed.status: PASS - clears and re-seeds, works on subsequent runs

docs_generate_articles.status: PASS - generates document with multiple slides

docs_list.status: PASS - lists all documents including Articles of Incorporation

docs_categories.status: PASS - returns 7 categories (operations, signed, security, company_policy, legal, training, integrations)

category_filter_pills_height.status: PASS - fixed height: 36 prevents size jumping

keypad_contact_overlay.status: VERIFIED via code review - uses position:'absolute' and top:'100%'
